On this page

`SELECT DISTINCT` is used to return only distinct (i.e different) values from a
column as part of a [SELECT statement](/docs/query/sql/select/).

## Syntax[​](#syntax "Direct link to Syntax")

![Flow chart showing the syntax of the DISTINCT keyword](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

## Examples[​](#examples "Direct link to Examples")

The following query will return a list of all unique ratings in the table.

Simple query

```prism-code
SELECT DISTINCT movieId  
FROM ratings;
```

SELECT DISTINCT can be used in conjunction with more advanced queries and
filters.

With aggregate

```prism-code
SELECT DISTINCT movieId, count()  
FROM ratings;
```

With filter

```prism-code
SELECT DISTINCT movieId, count()  
FROM ratings  
WHERE score > 3;
```
